history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game-like user interface screen shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner above a profile panel for “Hutao Assisten 1,” including level, experience progress, and several stats.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a centered rectangular UI card containing the title “Hutao Assisten 1,” a highlighted “#1” badge, and multiple stat boxes. A circular avatar portrait appears on the left side of the card, showing an anime-style character with light-colored hair and a white outfit with red accents, framed by a purple ring.

Setting:
The background is a dark, purple-toned interface design with a gradient effect. The card and text are presented in a clean, digital layout with no visible real-world scene, suggesting an in-app or game progress screen.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in large gold/yellow lettering with small decorative diamond shapes on either side. The main card has rounded corners and a slightly lighter dark border. Inside the card:
On the left, the circular avatar sits with a purple outer outline.
Across the middle, a dark purple pill label reads “LEVEL 6” with a large “6” beneath it.
To the right, a teal progress box reads “EXPERIENCE” and shows “20 / 350” in larger white text, with a horizontal progress bar beneath it that is mostly empty.
Below the progress bar, the percentage “5%” appears to the right.
At the bottom row, three darker stat tiles show “MESSAGES 258,” “XP NEEDED 330,” and “NEXT LVL 7.”
The overall lighting is flat and UI-like, with contrasting purple, teal, and gold text elements, and the layout is horizontally centered with the avatar aligned to the left within the card.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Hutao Assisten 1
#1
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
6
EXPERIENCE
20 / 350
5%
MESSAGES
258
XP NEEDED
330
NEXT LVL
7
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image displays a level-up interface panel for “Hutao Assisten 1,” showing current level and experience progress. It also lists additional stats including messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
